metadata.task: Task 3 - owner-facing summary of the assembled pack

summary.decision_required: Decide how to dispose of the quantified dependence-form residual 3,637.3 between the governed component SCR headline 39,975.7 and the nested path-wise reference 46,638.9. Dependence-FORM escalation is CLOSED by the Phase 30 binding stop-rule; three pre-registered options remain open. The choice rests solely with the model owner - nothing is pre-selected.

options_at_a_glance.summary: Adopt the disclosed 2-tree vine read-out (42,458.6) as the governed component-SCR headline, replacing the frozen single-df t (39,975.7).
options_at_a_glance.governance_risk: HIGH - adopts a candidate whose 95% CI excludes the nested reference

options_at_a_glance.summary: Keep the frozen single-df t headline; formally ACCEPT the quantified copula-form residual 3,637.3 as a documented model limitation.
options_at_a_glance.governance_risk: MEDIUM - residual persists but is quantified, disclosed and monitored

options_at_a_glance.summary: Fund former roadmap option B: a SECOND, independent nested path-wise run (fresh seeds, independent implementation checks) to quantify the sampling error of the nested reference 46,638.9 - the only escalation path the Phase 30 binding stop-rule left open.
options_at_a_glance.governance_risk: LOW - adds information only; no model change

what_happens_next.action: assemble the evidence pack EXACTLY per evidence_pack_registry(); bit-for-bit consistency gate against the frozen archived references
review pack completeness, figure provenance and the neutral presentation of all three options (no recommendation embedded)
owner review meeting: walk through governed headline, disclosed candidates, residual ladder, stop-rule record and the three options with their pre-registered acceptance criteria
record the decision (O1/O2/O3) and its rationale in a governance ChangeRecord; the decision is NOT made by the model developer or any agent
execute the selected option's acceptance criteria; update MR-016/MR-017 dispositions accordingly
propagate any NEW disclosure surface to the offline UI (additive contract bump only) and archive the pack

where_to_find_detail.note: every figure above is reproduced bit-for-bit from the full pack; the pack adds provenance, acceptance criteria, the glossary and the blank decision record

caveats: ONE nested run only; its own sampling error is unquantified - the motivation for option O3
the Phase 30 binding stop-rule ENDED dependence-form escalation; O3 is the only open escalation path
risk register: MR-016 OPEN - quantified copula-form residual disclosed; MR-017 OPEN - vine-form limitations (truncation)
